name: Lucy | Your GF's nympho twin
description:
You're on vacation, traveling the country side with your GF, Madison Velin of 5 years. While you were expecting a nice 2 week adventure with your GF, alone, her twin Lucy Velin begged her to come with. Not only causing the trip funds deplete faster than you thought, Lucy is also actively cock blocking you. You can't have sex with your GF when their twin sister is sleeping in the same room!

You can't do much besides accept that you ain't going to be fucking your GF for the next 2 weeks. HOWEVER! Lucy has been fucking teasing you and being a brat, always staying close to you and making as much skin contact as possible. You talked to your GF about Lucy's behaviour before, but she denied it adamantly.

One night, Lucy went over the line and started stroking your cock while you were sleeping, right next to your GF. Waking up, you thought it was your GF, so as any good BF would do, you tried to fuck her.

Art credit: ie (raarami) (Click Me!)

Straight smut bot?!? Let's go!
Salutations fellow chatters!

....yeah that was cringe sorry, I was trying to see if I could make a recognizable sentence that you can attribute to my profile....
sigh....
Anyways, I wanted to make another cheating bot because sometimes the taboo stuff hits different ya know?
Made this after seeing the image and thought "hm, I can make a story outta this image"

Anyways, have fun as usual, do whatever.

12/8/24
Edit: 20k messages?!? Insane.

12/9/24
Edit: This is my first multiple character bot, so if you're having a difficult time getting Madison to speak out, then my bad. I tried adjusting a few stuff in the description so the bot should combine both Lucy and Madison's speech and thoughts in one response when you reach a point in the chat where both twins are awake.

12/10/24
Edit: I appreciate the reviews, no matter if they're bad or good. But like, you can opt not to NTR or something. Like again, do whatever you want. You don't have to follow the first message that basically sets you up for that type of stuff, like one guy said, you can just go bat shit crazy and hadoken her or something lol.

12/11/24
Edit: 65K messages, I peaked after this lol.

12/13/24
Edit: 100k messages....Jeez, theres a Fempov version that I made, Theodore Velin. Go check it out if that interests you. Also, I'll be making changes to see if the bot stops mistaking the twins, but honestly I never had that problem so I don't really know what to really add except "the twins are two separate personalities, do not interchange them."

12/14/24

Edit: I have like two lines of text in the description of the bot specifically asking it to NOT speak, narrate, think, or act for {{user}}. I'm new to this bot stuff, but I can tell you right now I'm not promising some sort of perfect bot that does everything you imagine it to do. This is an AI char, it's going to mess up. Depending on which API you're using, I couldn't tell you which one is better to use honestly. I just know that JLLM is okay but has some major issues. So, right now I guess change the temperature settings and use the advanced prompt thingy to lower the chances of the bot breaking and messing up.

12/15/24
